metrics.notes: mae = mean absolute y-error on overlapping x-range; nmae = mae / (ymax - ymin); bias = mean(model - gt); pearson_r = correlation of interpolated curves; ks = max |model(x) - gt(x)|; integral_l1 = ∫ |model(x) - gt(x)| dx over overlap; x_overlap_ratio = overlap length / union length; x_misaligned = True when overlap too small to trust comparison.
